title: SACT Scheduler: An Intelligent Scheduling System for Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy at Velindre Cancer Centre
description: Full codebase for the MSc dissertation 'SACT Scheduler'. Includes the CP-SAT optimiser (with DRO + CVaR + fairness constraints + column generation + GNN pre-filter + slack post-spread robustness), ML prediction stack (no-show ensemble, conformal duration, TFT, causal ML, decision-focused learning), fairness auditor with SHAP root-cause analysis, benchmark harnesses, test suite, and the LaTeX + R pipeline that renders the dissertation. Tag this release to mint a DOI via Zenodo's GitHub integration. All dissertation results reproducible via `docker run --rm sact-scheduler:repro` from the repository root.

creators.name: Wei, Wenmin
creators.affiliation: Cardiff University, School of Computer Science & Informatics

notes: Reproducibility image: `docker build --target reproducibility -t sact-scheduler:repro .` then `docker run --rm sact-scheduler:repro` runs the full 1060+ pytest suite. Benchmarks (weight-sensitivity, component-significance, fairness-shap, ablation, external-algorithms) each ship a JSONL harness consumed by the R analysis pipeline `dissertation/dissertation_analysis.R`. See `reproducibility/manifest.json` for the captured environment snapshot (git SHA + pip freeze + Python version + JSONL checksums).
